did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that discusses the role of AI in dermatology (e.g., AI-powered platforms, mobile apps with CNNs) but does not use AI itself to obtain new study results. It summarizes existing literature and technologies rather than conducting an original experiment or analysis using AI/ML.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
